questions.text: The focal length of a concave mirror is:
questions.explanation: According to sign convention, focal length of concave mirror is negative. For convex mirror, it is positive.

questions.text: Light travels faster in denser medium.
questions.explanation: Light travels slower in denser medium. Speed of light is maximum in vacuum (3 × 10⁸ m/s).

questions.correctAnswer: The bending of light when it passes from one medium to another.
questions.explanation: Refraction is the bending of light as it passes obliquely from one transparent medium to another due to change in speed.

questions.text: The power of a lens is measured in ________.
questions.explanation: Power of lens (P) = 1/f (in meters). The SI unit is dioptre (D). Convex lens has positive power, concave has negative.
